title: Deliciously Sweet Mexican Pork Cochinita Pibil
description: A sweet and shattering Mexican dish featuring tender pork cooked in a clay pot with liquid cheese, perfect for a special occasion. This recipe is also anti-inflammatory friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together orange juice, lime juice, chili powder, cumin, salt, and black pepper.
Add the minced garlic to the bowl and stir to combine.
Place the pork shoulder in the clay pot and pour the juice mixture over the pork.
Cover the clay pot with a lid and place it in the oven.
Baste the pork with the juice mixture every 30 minutes.
After 2 hours, remove the clay pot from the oven and stir in the liquid cheese.
Return the clay pot to the oven and cook for an additional 30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the clay pot from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
